case_name: In re Equifax Inc. Customer Data Security Breach Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Georgia
description: Global resolution of up to $700M for a 2017 breach exposing the personal data of roughly 147 million consumers, including a consumer fund and credit monitoring.

case_name: In re T-Mobile Customer Data Security Breach Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Western District of Missouri
description: $350M fund for a 2021 cyberattack affecting roughly 76 million customers, plus a commitment to spend $150M on data security.

case_name: In re Capital One Consumer Data Security Breach Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Virginia
description: $190M settlement over the 2019 breach affecting about 98 million U.S. customers and applicants.

case_name: In re Anthem, Inc. Data Breach Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: Then-record $115M data-breach settlement over a 2015 cyberattack exposing data of nearly 79 million people.

case_name: In re Yahoo! Inc. Customer Data Security Breach Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $117.5M settlement covering a series of breaches between 2013 and 2016 affecting roughly 3 billion accounts worldwide.

case_name: In re Premera Blue Cross Customer Data Security Breach Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of Oregon
description: $74M settlement over a 2014 breach of the health insurer affecting about 11 million people, including $32M in consumer relief.

case_name: In re Morgan Stanley Data Security Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $60M settlement after the firm failed to properly decommission data-center equipment containing customer data.

case_name: In re 23andMe, Inc. Customer Data Security Breach Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $30M settlement over a 2023 credential-stuffing breach exposing genetic and ancestry data of about 6.9 million users.

case_name: In re Cash App Data Security Litigation (Block, Inc.)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $15M settlement over 2022–2023 security incidents, with class members eligible for up to $2,500 in documented losses.

case_name: In re Wawa, Inc. Data Security Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Pennsylvania
description: Consumer settlement (~$9M in gift cards and cash) over a 2019 point-of-sale malware breach affecting payment cards.

case_name: In re Uber Technologies, Inc. Data Breach (Multistate AG)
court_full: Multistate Attorneys General settlement
description: $148M multistate settlement over a 2016 breach affecting 57 million users and drivers that Uber concealed for a year.

case_name: In re Marriott International Customer Data Security Breach Litigation
court_full: Multistate Attorneys General settlement
description: $52M multistate AG settlement (plus FTC order) over the Starwood reservation breach affecting up to 131 million U.S. guests.

case_name: Nuance Communications MOVEit Data Breach Litigation
description: $8.5M settlement tied to the 2023 MOVEit file-transfer vulnerability exploited across many organizations.

case_name: In re Facebook, Inc. Consumer Privacy User Profile Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: Record $725M privacy settlement over third-party access to user data, including the Cambridge Analytica harvesting scandal.

case_name: In re Facebook Biometric Information Privacy Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $650M settlement under Illinois' BIPA over facial-recognition 'Tag Suggestions' applied without consent.

case_name: Rivera v. Google LLC (Google Photos BIPA)
court_full: Circuit Court of Cook County, Illinois
description: $100M Illinois BIPA settlement over face-grouping in Google Photos applied to Illinois users without consent.

case_name: In re TikTok, Inc. Consumer Privacy Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Illinois
description: $92M settlement over collection of biometric and personal data, including from minors, without proper consent.

case_name: Boone v. Snap Inc. (Snapchat BIPA)
court_full: Circuit Court of Cook County, Illinois
description: $35M Illinois BIPA settlement over biometric data collected by Snapchat's Lenses and Filters features.

case_name: In re Clearview AI, Inc. Consumer Privacy Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Illinois
description: Novel settlement giving the class a ~23% equity stake (valued ~$51.75M) over scraping billions of facial images.

case_name: In re Zoom Video Communications Privacy Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $85M settlement over data-sharing with third parties and 'Zoombombing' security lapses during the pandemic.

case_name: In re Plaid Inc. Privacy Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $58M settlement over collection of banking credentials and transaction data when linking accounts to fintech apps.

case_name: State AGs v. Google LLC (Location Tracking)
court_full: 40-State Attorneys General settlement
description: $391.5M settlement with 40 states over misleading users about how location tracking could be turned off.

case_name: Brown v. Google LLC (Incognito Tracking)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: Injunctive settlement requiring Google to destroy billions of records and revise disclosures about Incognito mode; no consumer fund.

case_name: In re Vizio, Inc. Consumer Privacy Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Central District of California
description: $17M settlement over smart TVs that tracked viewing data and shared it with advertisers without consent.

case_name: Lopez v. Apple Inc. (Siri Voice Recordings)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $95M settlement over claims that accidental Siri activations recorded private conversations used for ad targeting.

case_name: In re Payment Card Interchange Fee and Merchant Discount Antitrust Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of New York
description: $5.54B settlement (the largest U.S. antitrust class settlement) for merchants over card interchange/swipe fees.

case_name: In re Blue Cross Blue Shield Antitrust Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Alabama
description: $2.67B subscriber settlement over territorial agreements alleged to suppress competition among BCBS plans.

case_name: In re College Athlete NIL Litigation (House v. NCAA)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $2.78B back-damages settlement permitting direct revenue sharing with Division I athletes for the first time.

case_name: In re Google Play Store Antitrust Litigation (States & Consumers)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $700M settlement with 50+ states/territories and consumers over Play Store fees and distribution restrictions.

case_name: In re Apple Inc. E-Books Antitrust Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $400M consumer payout after Apple was found liable for conspiring with publishers to raise e-book prices.

case_name: In re Domestic Airline Travel Antitrust Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of Columbia
description: $60M in settlements (American $45M, Southwest $15M) over alleged coordination to limit seat capacity and raise fares.

case_name: In re Broiler Chicken Antitrust Litigation (End-User Consumers)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Illinois
description: Consumer-class settlements (Tyson $99M, Pilgrim's $75.5M and others) over an alleged broiler-chicken price-fixing conspiracy.

case_name: Sullivan v. DB Investments, Inc. (De Beers Diamonds)
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of New Jersey
description: $295M settlement resolving claims that De Beers monopolized and inflated prices in the diamond market.

case_name: In re 3M Combat Arms Earplug Products Liability Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Florida
description: $6B settlement of the largest mass tort in U.S. history, resolving ~260,000 veterans' hearing-loss claims.

case_name: In re Roundup Products Liability Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: ~$10.9B master settlement resolving roughly 100,000 claims that Roundup weedkiller caused non-Hodgkin lymphoma.

case_name: In re Johnson & Johnson Talcum Powder Products Liability Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of New Jersey
description: Proposed ~$8.9B settlement (later restructured to ~$10B) over claims talc products were contaminated with asbestos and caused cancer; contested in bankruptcy.

case_name: In re Volkswagen 'Clean Diesel' Marketing, Sales Practices Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $14.7B settlement over software that cheated diesel emissions tests, funding buybacks and environmental remediation.

case_name: In re Takata Airbag Products Liability Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of Florida
description: Economic-loss settlements (~$1.5B across automakers) over defective airbag inflators linked to deaths and injuries.

case_name: In re General Motors LLC Ignition Switch Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $120M economic-loss settlement over defective ignition switches linked to stalls; separate from prior DOJ and victim funds.

case_name: In re Toyota Motor Corp. Unintended Acceleration Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Central District of California
description: ~$1.6B economic-loss settlement over unintended-acceleration claims affecting millions of vehicles.

case_name: In re Philips Recalled CPAP, BiPAP & Ventilator Products Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Western District of Pennsylvania
description: $1.1B personal-injury settlement (plus a prior $479M economic-loss deal) over foam degradation in breathing devices.

case_name: In re National Football League Players' Concussion Injury Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Pennsylvania
description: Uncapped settlement (est. $1B+ over 65 years) compensating retired players for neurocognitive injuries from concussions.

case_name: In re Juul Labs, Inc. Marketing, Sales Practices Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $1.7B settlement resolving thousands of personal-injury, consumer, and government claims over youth-targeted vaping marketing.

case_name: In re Oil Spill by the Oil Rig 'Deepwater Horizon'
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Louisiana
description: $20B global civil settlement (atop a ~$7.8B economic-loss class deal) for the 2010 Gulf of Mexico oil spill.

case_name: In re PG&E Corporation (Fire Victim Trust)
court_full: U.S. Bankruptcy Court, Northern District of California
description: $13.5B Fire Victim Trust for survivors of the 2017–2018 wildfires, including the Camp Fire, caused by PG&E equipment.

case_name: In re Aqueous Film-Forming Foams (PFAS) Products Liability Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of South Carolina
description: Up to $10.3B settlement to help public water systems test for and remediate 'forever chemicals' (PFAS) contamination.

case_name: In re E.I. du Pont de Nemours C-8 Personal Injury Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of Ohio
description: $671M settlement resolving ~3,550 claims that C8 (PFOA) discharged from a West Virginia plant caused disease.

case_name: In re Flint Water Cases
defendant: State of Michigan; City of Flint
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Michigan
description: $626M settlement (mostly from the State of Michigan) for residents harmed by lead-contaminated drinking water.

case_name: Exxon Shipping Co. v. Baker (Exxon Valdez)
court_full: Supreme Court of the United States
description: Punitive damages reduced to $507.5M by the Supreme Court for the 1989 Alaska oil spill affecting fishermen and natives.

case_name: Anderson v. Pacific Gas & Electric (Hinkley)
court_full: Superior Court of California, San Bernardino County
description: $333M settlement over chromium-6 groundwater contamination in Hinkley, California — the case behind 'Erin Brockovich.'

case_name: Jabbari v. Wells Fargo & Co. (Unauthorized Accounts)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $142M consumer class settlement over millions of unauthorized deposit and credit-card accounts opened in customers' names.

case_name: In re Apple Inc. Device Performance Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: Up to $500M settlement over software updates that throttled performance on older iPhones without disclosure.

case_name: In re Apple Inc. MacBook Keyboard Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $50M settlement over 'butterfly' keyboards prone to sticking and failing keys on 2015–2019 MacBooks.

case_name: FTC v. Amazon.com, Inc. (Prime Enrollment & Cancellation)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Western District of Washington
description: $2.5B FTC settlement ($1B penalty + $1.5B consumer refunds) over deceptive Prime enrollment and cancellation flows.

case_name: State AGs v. Intuit Inc. (TurboTax 'Free' Marketing)
court_full: Multistate Attorneys General settlement
description: $141M settlement with all 50 states for steering eligible filers away from genuinely free tax filing toward paid TurboTax.

case_name: FTC v. Epic Games, Inc. (Fortnite)
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of North Carolina
description: $245M FTC refund settlement over 'dark patterns' and unauthorized in-game charges in Fortnite (plus a $275M COPPA penalty).

case_name: In re Kia Hyundai Vehicle Theft Marketing & Products Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Central District of California
description: ~$200M settlement over vehicles lacking engine immobilizers that became targets of a viral theft trend.

case_name: FTC / DOJ v. Western Union Co.
court_full: U.S. District Court, Middle District of Pennsylvania
description: $586M settlement returning money to consumers defrauded by scammers who used Western Union's money-transfer system.

case_name: Careathers v. Red Bull North America, Inc.
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $13M settlement over advertising claims that the energy drink improved performance beyond ordinary caffeine.

case_name: In re Capital One Telephone Consumer Protection Act Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Illinois
description: $75.5M settlement over automated collection calls to cell phones without consent in violation of the TCPA.

case_name: Birchmeier v. Caribbean Cruise Line, Inc.
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Illinois
description: $76M settlement over millions of 'free cruise' robocalls using a fake political-survey pretext.

case_name: Krakauer v. Dish Network, L.L.C.
court_full: U.S. District Court, Middle District of North Carolina
description: Jury verdict (trebled to ~$61M) over telemarketing calls to numbers on the National Do-Not-Call Registry.

case_name: In re Enron Corp. Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of Texas
description: $7.24B recovered for investors from banks and others over the accounting fraud that collapsed Enron.

case_name: In re WorldCom, Inc. Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $6.19B in settlements from banks and directors over an $11B accounting fraud that led to WorldCom's bankruptcy.

case_name: In re Tyco International, Ltd. Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of New Hampshire
description: $3.2B settlement (incl. auditor PwC) over accounting fraud and looting by Tyco's former executives.

case_name: In re Cendant Corp. Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of New Jersey
description: $3.52B settlement over inflated earnings from accounting irregularities at predecessor CUC International.

case_name: In re AOL Time Warner Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $2.5B settlement over inflated online-advertising revenue surrounding the AOL–Time Warner merger.

case_name: In re Petrobras Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $3B settlement for investors over a sprawling bribery and kickback scandal at the Brazilian oil company.

case_name: In re Bank of America Corp. Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York
description: $2.43B settlement over disclosures about Merrill Lynch's losses and bonuses ahead of the 2009 merger vote.

case_name: In re Valeant Pharmaceuticals Int'l Securities Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, District of New Jersey
description: $1.21B settlement over deceptive pricing and the secret Philidor specialty-pharmacy arrangement.

case_name: In re High-Tech Employee Antitrust Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $415M settlement over secret agreements among tech firms not to recruit each other's employees, suppressing wages.

case_name: In re Animation Workers Antitrust Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $100M in settlements over agreements among animation studios not to solicit each other's artists and engineers.

case_name: In re FedEx Ground Package System Employment Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California (9th Cir.)
description: $228M settlement for California drivers misclassified as independent contractors rather than employees.

case_name: In re Wal-Mart Wage & Hour Employment Practices Litigation
court_full: Consolidated state and federal wage-and-hour actions
description: Up to $352M across dozens of suits alleging missed breaks and off-the-clock work for hourly employees.

case_name: O'Connor v. Uber Technologies, Inc.
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of California
description: $20M settlement for California and Massachusetts drivers over independent-contractor classification claims.

case_name: In re Vioxx Products Liability Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Eastern District of Louisiana
description: $4.85B settlement resolving claims that the painkiller Vioxx increased the risk of heart attacks and strokes.

case_name: In re Actos (Pioglitazone) Products Liability Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Western District of Louisiana
description: ~$2.37B settlement over claims the diabetes drug Actos increased the risk of bladder cancer.

case_name: In re National Prescription Opiate Litigation
court_full: U.S. District Court, Northern District of Ohio
description: $26B national settlement with the three largest drug distributors and J&J over their role in the opioid epidemic.

case_name: In re Purdue Pharma L.P. (Sackler Opioid Settlement)
court_full: U.S. Bankruptcy Court, Southern District of New York
description: ~$6B Sackler contribution to opioid abatement; the original plan's liability releases were struck down by the Supreme Court in 2024.
